title: statice armeria subsp. muelleri
intro: Statice armeria subsp. muelleri, also known as the dryad or sea lavender, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Statice armeria subsp. muelleri include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
